name: Scalar Relay
description: Professional SMTP Relay Bridge for SaaS and Self-Hosting.

SERVICE_FQDN_SCALAR.description: The Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN) for your Scalar Relay instance (e.g., https://relay.example.com).

SESSION_SECRET.description: High-entropy secret for secure session management. Generate a random string.

PORT.description: Internal port the service runs on.

NODE_ENV.description: The environment the application runs in.
